title: Shells Town Under Morgan’s Fear
description: On pages 0–3, this part moves through Shells Town and the first clues about Zoro, Morgan, and Helmeppo’s abuse of power.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: ...A demonic beast, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: RORDONOA ZOLD IS HIS REAL NAME...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: BUT THEY CALL HIM "ZOLO THE PIRATE HUNTER."

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: He's like a bloodthirty hound...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: ...ROAMING THE SEAS, HUNTING MEN FOR THE BOUNTIES ON THEIR HEADS!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: THEY SAY HE'S A DEMON IN HUMAN FORM.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Hmmm...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: LIFFY, HE'S A PIRATE HUNTER! PIRATE HUNTERS DON'T MIX WELL WITH PIRATES!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: I haven't decided whether I'll invite him to join my crew or not.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: IF HE'S A GOOD GUY, THEN I'LL-

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: HE'S IN PRISON BECAUSE HE'S NOT A GOOD GUY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WE'RE FINALLY HERE! WE MADE IT TO THE NAVAL BASE TOWN.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: YEAH! WE FINALLY MADE IT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KOBY, YOU'RE AMAZING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: You actually got us to our DESTI- NATION!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OF COURSE I DID! THAT'S THE MINIMUM REQUIRE-MENT FOR PEOPLE WHO SAIL THE SEAS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Of course I did!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffy, if you keep randomly floating around, you'll never become a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You should find a navi- gator for your crew.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: YEAH!! That's what I'll do!! Now, let's eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WELL, KOBY, I GUESS THIS IS WHERE WE GO OUR SEPARATE WAYS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hope you join the Navy and become a great sailor!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: TH-THANK YOU, LIFFY!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: AND I HOPE YOU BECOME A GREAT PIRATE!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: ...Even if that means we'll be enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, I just remembered... That guy is supposed to be imprisoned here.. RORDOA Zolo...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: MAYBE YOU SHOULDN'T SAY THAT NAME OUT LOUD AROUND HERE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmmm...

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
